Please select start and end dates: Please select start and end dates
access_denied_desc: You do not have permission to view this page. Contact your administrator.
access_token_placeholder: Leave blank if no SYNC_TOKEN was set
adjust_stock_note: Use Inventory → Adjust Stock to change per-branch quantities.
affected_users_logout_warning: Affected users must log out and back in for changes to take effect.
affected_users_warning: Affected users must log out and back in for changes to take effect.
all_custom_tables: All custom tables and their data
all_settings: All app settings (business name, currency, etc.)
all_users_except_primary: All users EXCEPT the primary admin account
audit_log_desc: Default columns: Record · Device · User · Action — click a row to see all details including data changes.
awaiting_payment_title: Awaiting Payment — not yet counted as revenue
backup_warning: This will replace ALL current data. Cannot be undone.
branch_delete_has_stock: Cannot delete — transfer all stock out first
choose_branch: Choose which branch this item comes from
click_row_details: Click row → full details + data changes
cloudflare_url_hint: Paste the URL printed in the terminal by start-server. Must start with https://
configure_payment_desc: Configure payment methods shown in POS checkout
configure_security_desc: Configure session duration and security settings
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
confirm_delete_branch: Delete branch? This cannot be undone.
confirm_delete_branches_count: Delete selected branches? This cannot be undone.
add_stock_desc: This will add the same quantity to each selected product.
transfer_same_branch_error: Source and destination cannot be the same
no_data_add_row: No data yet. Add a row!
please_select_start_end_dates: Please select start and end dates
click_add_column: Click "Add Column" to define your table structure
csv_template_columns: name*, sku, barcode, category, brand, unit, description, selling_price_usd, selling_price_khr, purchase_price_usd, purchase_price_khr, stock_quantity, low_stock_threshold, supplier, branch, image_filename_1..5, image_filenames, image_conflict_mode
customize_fonts: Customize fonts, sizes, colors and layout style
data_reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all data?
default_branch_desc: New sales and stock adjustments default to this branch
delivery_fee_position_after_desc: Delivery fee shown after the totals section
delivery_fee_position_totals_desc: Delivery fee shown inside the totals section
delivery_position_after_desc: Appears right after the items, before totals
edit_return_warning: Editing a return will recalculate stock and refund amounts.
everything_listed: ALL sales, products, customers, suppliers, inventory
export_backup_desc: Downloads a .json file containing all products, sales, returns, customers, suppliers, stock, settings, and custom tables.
export_desc: Exports database, product images, and a JSON snapshot to a folder.
factory_item1: All sales, products, stock, inventory movements
factory_reset_complete: Factory reset complete. Please set up the app from scratch.
factory_reset_desc: Wipes everything including users, roles, settings, and branches. The database is fully reset to its initial empty state.
factory_reset_warning: ⛔ EXTREME CAUTION: This deletes absolutely everything. There is NO undo.
img_rule_1: Filename must match product name exactly (e.g. Coffee Latte.jpg)
img_rule_3: Existing product images will be replaced
import_all_select_type: Select the contact type to import:
import_backup_desc: Restores data from a previously exported .json backup file. Current data (products, sales, returns, contacts, stock, settings) will be replaced.
import_backup_warning: This will replace existing data. Export a fresh backup first if you want to keep your current data.
import_step_desc: Download the template, fill in your data, then upload.
insufficient_amount: Amount paid is less than total
keep_terminal_open: Keep the terminal open — closing it stops the sync server.
manual_return_hint: Manual return — not linked to a sale.
name: Name
net_revenue_desc: Net revenue = gross sales minus returns/refunds in selected period.
new_product_branch_help: New products should start in a branch so opening stock and later inventory movements stay tied to the right location.
new_product_branch_note: New products should start in a branch so opening stock and later inventory movements stay tied to the right location.
no_branch_stock: No stock in this branch. Use Transfer or Adjust Stock to add items.
no_customers: No customers yet. Add or import customers above.
no_named_customers: No named customers in this period
no_returns_found: No returns found. Click "+ New Return" to process one.
no_suppliers: No suppliers yet. Add or import suppliers above.
not_assigned_branch: Not assigned to a specific branch
offline_first_desc: If the sync server is unreachable, the app falls back to local database automatically. Data syncs again when the server comes back online.
opening_stock_note: Opening stock quantity will be recorded under this branch.
otp_enter_code: Enter the code from your authenticator app to confirm setup
print_auto_save_note: 🖨️ Settings saved automatically and applied every time you print from POS or Sales.
print_test_desc: Send a sample receipt to verify settings.
receipt_language_desc: Controls the language used for receipt labels and field names
reset_all_deleted: All sales, returns, products, stock, customers, suppliers, delivery contacts, inventory movements
reset_all_desc: Deletes everything: sales, returns, products, customers, suppliers, stock movements. Settings, users, and branches are kept.
reset_all_kept: Users, roles, branches, categories, units, settings
reset_business_desc: Permanently deletes all sales, products, inventory, customers, and suppliers. Users, roles, branches, and settings are kept.
reset_sales_deleted: All sales, all returns, all inventory movements, all stock quantities (zeroed)
reset_sales_desc: Deletes all sales and returns history and zeros all stock quantities. Products, customers, and suppliers are kept.
reset_sales_kept: Products, customers, suppliers, settings, users, branches
return_items_required: Select at least one item to return.
return_search_hint: Enter a receipt number or sale ID. You can also skip and do a manual return.
revenue_net_returns: Revenue is net of returns for the selected period.
rfd_business_name: Company name at top of receipt
rfd_delivery_show_contact: Recipient name and phone on receipt
rfd_show_discount: Show when a discount was applied
rfd_show_emojis: Show emoji icons in receipts (📞 🚚 🏷️ etc)
role_saved_relogin: Role saved — affected users must log out and back in
rs_auto_save_hint: Toggle any field on/off. All changes auto-save and apply instantly to the live preview and to receipts printed from POS & Sales.
search_and_tip: AND mode — all terms must match
search_comma_tip: Comma separates OR-groups · space = AND within a group
search_example_finds: Example: coffee,latte finds products containing coffee OR latte
search_instructions: Comma separates OR-groups · space = AND within a group
search_receipt_hint: Enter receipt # or sale ID to find the original sale
search_receipt_or_id: Search by receipt number or sale ID
search_returns_placeholder: 🔍 Search by return #, receipt, customer, reason…
session_duration_hint: Applied as default on login screen (can be overridden per login)
show_emojis_receipt_desc: Toggle emoji icons in receipt (📞 🚚 🏷️ etc.)
stock_desc_out: 🔴 Shows Out of Stock when stock ≤ 0
sync_auto_connected_desc: This device is automatically connected to the sync server on your network.
sync_description: Your laptop runs the sync server. Cloudflare Tunnel makes it reachable from any network or device.
sync_local_only_desc: Running in local-only mode. Changes are not synced to other devices.
sync_manual_url_hint: Paste the URL printed in the terminal by start-server. Must start with https://
sync_server_desc: One device runs the server. All devices open the Tailscale URL in browser — no manual setup needed.
sync_setup_title: Setup (run once on the main laptop)
sync_step1_desc: Double-click start-server.bat (Windows) or run bash start-server.sh (Mac/Linux)
sync_step2_desc: Wait ~10 seconds. A public Cloudflare URL appears in the terminal.
sync_step3_desc: Copy that URL and paste it below on every device that needs to sync.
sync_step4_desc: Keep the terminal open — closing it stops the sync server.
sync_step_1: Double-click start-server.bat (Windows) or run bash start-server.sh (Mac/Linux)
sync_step_2: Wait ~10 seconds. A public URL appears
sync_step_3: Copy that URL and paste it below on every device that needs to sync
sync_time_note1: All timestamps are stored in UTC on the server.
sync_time_note2: Display timezone converts UTC to your local time.
sync_time_note3: Drift shows the difference between server and client clocks.
sync_time_note4: Small drift (< 1 min) is normal and does not affect data.
sync_token_hint: Leave blank if no SYNC_TOKEN was set
tap_product_to_add: Tap a product to add it to cart
tap_row_to_view_edit: Tap a row to view or edit
tap_to_view_edit: Tap a row to view details or edit
timezone_desc: Used for displaying sale times, dashboard hours, and audit logs in your local time.
timezone_display_note: Time is always accurate — only the display label changes
two_factor_desc: Protect your admin account with an authenticator app
users_kept: Users, roles, branches, and settings will NOT be deleted.
view_only_message: 👁 View only — contact an administrator to make changes.
what_customers_pay: What customers pay at point of sale
what_customers_pay_pos: What customers pay at point of sale
what_you_pay_supplier: What you pay the supplier when buying stock
receipt_order_drag_hint: 🖐️ Drag rows to reorder receipt sections. Use ↑↓ arrows or drag. Insert divider lines anywhere to visually separate sections on the receipt.
pos_status_choose_desc: Choose how this sale is being processed. This will appear in Sales history.
pos_status_awaiting_payment_desc: Order placed, payment pending — stock held
pos_status_awaiting_delivery_desc: Paid, not yet delivered — stock deducted
inventory_and_or_tip: Comma separates terms. Use AND mode for all terms or OR mode for any term.
sale_membership_attach_hint: Use this when a sale was created anonymously and staff need to link it to a member later.
branch_default_hint: New sales and stock adjustments default to this branch.
invalid_transfer_quantity: Transfer quantity must be greater than zero
returns_scope_hint: Customer refunds and supplier returns are tracked separately.
supplier_return_hint: Send stock back to supplier and record compensation/loss.
supplier_return_stock_hint: Only products with stock in the selected branch are shown. Returned quantity cannot exceed available stock.
supplier_return_summary_hint: Loss = total cost - supplier compensation. This affects inventory valuation and return accounting.
supplier_return_edit_not_supported: Supplier returns cannot be edited from this form yet.
search_products_placeholder: Search products by name, SKU, category
tap_to_view_details: Tap a record to view details.
folder_picker_fallback: Native folder picker is unavailable in this runtime. Use Choose Path (manual) below.
sync_auto_detected_note: Your server was auto-detected from the page URL. Only change these settings if you need to connect to a different server.
tap_any_stat_for_details: Tap any stat card for details.
password_required_new_user: Password is required for new users
users_page_desc: Manage staff accounts, roles, and login security from one place.
users_view_only_note: View-only mode for shared users. Account details and OTP can still be managed from your profile button.
avatar_upload_note: Use My Profile to upload an image
current_password_required_save: Current password is required to save account changes
new_password_min_length: Use at least 4 characters for the new password
new_password_confirm_mismatch: New password confirmation does not match
current_password_required_change: Current password is required to change password
login_duration_saved: Login duration preference saved. It will be used on the next login.
email_provider_setup_needed: Email code sending is not configured yet. Ask admin to configure an email sender provider.
phone_verification_disabled_note: Optional contact field. Phone verification is available after a phone-auth provider is configured.
profile_security_desc: Manage password, OTP login protection, and your default login duration.
admin_profile_override_hint: Admins can overwrite account fields directly and still send verification codes when needed.
self_service_profile_hint: Self-service changes require your current password. You can verify your email or phone with one-time checks.
cannot_manage_admin_account: You cannot modify another admin account.
system_role_edit_locked: System roles cannot be edited here.
enter_username_email_first: Enter your username or email first.
verification_provider_missing: No email code sender is configured yet. Please ask admin to configure email sending for verification codes.
verification_code_sent_if_exists: If the account exists, a verification code has been sent.
password_min_4: Use at least 4 characters for the new password.
password_reset_done: Password reset complete. You can now sign in with the new password.
shared_device_security_note: On shared devices, choose "Until I close the browser" for better security.
use_verified_email_notice: Use a verified email address to receive a one-time verification code.
upload_no_image_path: Upload did not return an image path
customerPortalDesc: Portal layout, business info, public path, images, and customer-facing content are edited inside the Customer Portal page with live preview. Point rules are managed in Loyalty Points.
navigationHint: Choose the sidebar order and which 4 items stay pinned in the mobile bottom bar.
sidebarTextColorHint: Overrides page names, section text, and icons on the sidebar/mobile nav
files_page_hint: Browse uploaded assets, reuse them across the app, and safely delete unused files.
library_page_hint: Manage uploaded assets, AI providers, and saved AI research from one place.
file_in_use: This file is still in use and cannot be deleted.
fo_desc_divider: Visual separator line on the receipt
receipt_pdf_layout_note: PDF export uses this exact receipt layout.
print_test_desc_pdf: Generate a sample PDF to verify sizing, margins, and readability.
secure_signin_workspace: Secure sign-in for your business workspace
oauth_matching_email_hint: Social sign-in works after admin creates your local account and the provider email matches your account email.
code_signin_notice: Sign in securely using a one-time code sent to your verified email.
enter_authenticator_code: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your app.
oauth_start_failed: Unable to start sign-in with provider.
sign_in_methods_desc: Keep your local admin-created account and add matching email, Google, or Facebook sign-in when ready.
add_email_before_connecting: Add your account email before connecting a sign-in provider.
email_login_ready_note: Verified email can be used for provider-backed sign-in and recovery.
verify_email_first_note: Verify your email first to make email-based recovery more reliable.
email_sender_vs_auth_note: Supabase auth is ready for sign-in methods. Email code sending needs a separate mail provider for verification and reset codes.
email_sender_only_note: Email verification and reset codes need a configured mail sender.
provider_email_match_note: Google and Facebook connect to the local account when the provider email matches your account email. Disabled or deleted local users still cannot access the app.
email_sender_setup_needed: Email code sending is not configured yet. Ask admin to configure an email sender provider.
email_sender_missing: No email code sender is configured yet. Please ask admin to configure email sending for verification codes.
server_folder_note: Folder actions use paths on the Business OS server device. When you are connected remotely, choose or paste a path that exists on that server machine.
server_restore_note: Restore uses a folder from the Business OS server device. Remote browsers cannot browse their own local disk into the server runtime.
host_ui_local_only: This action only works on the server machine. Type or paste a server path manually when connected remotely.
open_folder_local_only: Opening the folder is only available on the server machine.
host_ui_remote_note: Remote sessions cannot open the server machine folder dialog or Explorer window. Use Browse folders below or type a server path manually.
